channel.title: 战况追踪 — Global Conflict Monitor
channel.description: 实时追踪全球主要冲突态势，多源聚合情报

item.title: [俄乌战争] RUSSIA → UKRAINE : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Shahed, Fars, Iran)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: RUSSIA / UKRAINE. Location: Shahed, Fars, Iran. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 2 sources.

item.title: [俄乌战争] DEFENSE MINIST → VOLGOGRAD : Arrest, detain, or charge with legal action (Volgograd, Volgogradskaya Oblast', Russia)
item.description: GDELT Event: Arrest, detain, or charge with legal action. Actors: DEFENSE MINIST / VOLGOGRAD. Location: Volgograd, Volgogradskaya Oblast', Russia. Goldstein Scale: -5.0. Mentioned in 10 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] JEWISH → PALESTINIAN : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Gaza, Israel (general), Israel)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: JEWISH / PALESTINIAN. Location: Gaza, Israel (general), Israel. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 6 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Use unconventional violence, not specified below. Actors: COMMUNITY / nan. Location: Tantura, H_efa, Israel. Goldstein Scale: -9.0. Mentioned in 5 sources.
